summary: Tested materials array field fix in Bulk Category Editor. Found and fixed a bug where 'materials' field was missing from API response. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend UI toggle functionality verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: 'materials' field was missing from GET /api/supplier-sync/products response - added at line 3806 in supplier_sync.py
Fixed: Empty arrays [] were not being processed in bulk-update-unified - modified array_updates logic at line 10473-10479
seed_data_creation: None - used existing product LFGDV503 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Materials array field is now fully supported in bulk-update-unified endpoint. The fix involved: 1) Adding 'materials' to API response in GET /api/supplier-sync/products, 2) Allowing empty arrays to be processed for clearing values. Test product LFGDV503 was used for testing.

backend_apis: ✓ Materials array is saved to database correctly
✓ Materials can be cleared by sending empty array []
✓ Materials field is returned in GET /api/supplier-sync/products response
✓ Materials works alongside other array fields (rooms, styles, colors, features)
✓ All array fields (rooms, materials, styles, colors, features, sub_categories) are recognized
frontend_ui: ✓ Smart Suggestions section displays material suggestions (Natural Stone, Stone Effect)
✓ Clicking material suggestion toggles it ON (shows checkmark, blue style)
✓ Clicking same suggestion again toggles it OFF (shows +, green style)
✓ Apply All Suggestions button is present
✓ Apply to N Products button triggers confirmation dialog
✓ Confirmation dialog shows Update All Products / Only Fill Empty options

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: materials field was missing from API response
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added 'materials': p.get('materials', []) to product response object

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Empty arrays [] were not being processed, preventing clearing of materials
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed condition from 'if updates[field]' to 'if field in updates' to allow empty arrays
